sql.trim: t1.CREATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.DEPT_NAME, t1.AUTO_CODE, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.USER_NAME, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.VERSION, t1.PARTY_NAME, t1.REQUST_DATE, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.PARTY_ID, t1.ELECTION_TIME, t1.PARTY_YINGGAI, t1.PARTY_SHIJI, t1.THREE_FOUR_NAME, t1.THREE_FOUR_ID, t1.THREE_FOUR_NAME1, t1.THREE_FOUR_ID1, t1.PARTY_NAME_NEW, t1.PARTY_TYPE, t1.USER_TEL, t1.SFJW, t1.JW_TIME, t1.JW_YINGGA, t1.JW_SHIJI, t1.JW_CYL, t1.JW_THREE, t1.JW_THREE_ID, t1.PARTY_NEW_ID,

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH
CREATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
DEPT_NAME,
AUTO_CODE,
CREATION_DATE,
USER_NAME,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
VERSION,
PARTY_NAME,
REQUST_DATE,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
ORG_IDENTITY,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
PARTY_ID,
ELECTION_TIME,
PARTY_YINGGAI,
PARTY_SHIJI,
THREE_FOUR_NAME,
THREE_FOUR_ID,
THREE_FOUR_NAME1,
THREE_FOUR_ID1,
PARTY_NAME_NEW,
PARTY_TYPE,
USER_TEL,
SFJW,
JW_TIME,
JW_YINGGA,
JW_SHIJI,
JW_CYL,
JW_THREE,
JW_THREE_ID,
PARTY_NEW_ID,
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{requstDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{electionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{partyYinggai,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{partyShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{threeFourName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{threeFourId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{threeFourName1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{threeFourId1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sfjw,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{jwTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{jwYingga,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{jwShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{jwCyl,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{jwThree,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{jwThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{partyNewId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH( CREATED_BY , LAST_UPDATED_BY , DEPT_NAME , AUTO_CODE , CREATION_DATE , USER_NAME , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , VERSION , PARTY_NAME , REQUST_DATE , ID , CREATED_DEPT , ORG_IDENTITY , LAST_UPDATE_IP , PARTY_ID , ELECTION_TIME , PARTY_YINGGAI , PARTY_SHIJI , THREE_FOUR_NAME , THREE_FOUR_ID , THREE_FOUR_NAME1 , THREE_FOUR_ID1 , PARTY_NAME_NEW , PARTY_TYPE , USER_TEL , SFJW , JW_TIME , JW_YINGGA , JW_SHIJI , JW_CYL , JW_THREE , JW_THREE_ID , PARTY_NEW_ID )
select #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.requstDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.electionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.partyYinggai,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.partyShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.threeFourName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.threeFourId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.threeFourName1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.threeFourId1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sfjw,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.jwTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.jwYingga,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.jwShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.jwCyl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.jwThree,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.jwThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.partyNewId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
VERSION = version+1,
PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
REQUST_DATE = #{requstDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ELECTION_TIME = #{electionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
PARTY_YINGGAI = #{partyYinggai,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
PARTY_SHIJI = #{partyShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
THREE_FOUR_NAME = #{threeFourName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
THREE_FOUR_ID = #{threeFourId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
THREE_FOUR_NAME1 = #{threeFourName1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
THREE_FOUR_ID1 = #{threeFourId1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NAME_NEW = #{partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_TEL = #{userTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SFJW = #{sfjw,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JW_TIME = #{jwTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
JW_YINGGA = #{jwYingga,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
JW_SHIJI = #{jwShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
JW_CYL = #{jwCyl,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
JW_THREE = #{jwThree,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
JW_THREE_ID = #{jwThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARTY_NEW_ID = #{partyNewId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH set CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_NAME = #{deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , USER_NAME = #{userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , VERSION = version+1 , PARTY_NAME = #{partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUST_DATE = #{requstDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ELECTION_TIME = #{electionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_YINGGAI = #{partyYinggai,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_SHIJI = #{partyShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , THREE_FOUR_NAME = #{threeFourName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , THREE_FOUR_ID = #{threeFourId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , THREE_FOUR_NAME1 = #{threeFourName1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , THREE_FOUR_ID1 = #{threeFourId1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME_NEW = #{partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_TYPE = #{partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_TEL = #{userTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SFJW = #{sfjw,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JW_TIME = #{jwTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , JW_YINGGA = #{jwYingga,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JW_SHIJI = #{jwShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JW_CYL = #{jwCyl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JW_THREE = #{jwThree,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JW_THREE_ID = #{jwThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NEW_ID = #{partyNewId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_HUANJIE_DYDH set CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_NAME = #{item.deptName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , AUTO_CODE = #{item.autoCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , USER_NAME = #{item.userName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , VERSION = version+1 , PARTY_NAME = #{item.partyName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , REQUST_DATE = #{item.requstDate,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_ID = #{item.partyId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ELECTION_TIME = #{item.electionTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , PARTY_YINGGAI = #{item.partyYinggai,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , PARTY_SHIJI = #{item.partyShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , THREE_FOUR_NAME = #{item.threeFourName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , THREE_FOUR_ID = #{item.threeFourId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , THREE_FOUR_NAME1 = #{item.threeFourName1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , THREE_FOUR_ID1 = #{item.threeFourId1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NAME_NEW = #{item.partyNameNew,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_TYPE = #{item.partyType,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_TEL = #{item.userTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SFJW = #{item.sfjw,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JW_TIME = #{item.jwTime,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , JW_YINGGA = #{item.jwYingga,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JW_SHIJI = #{item.jwShiji,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JW_CYL = #{item.jwCyl,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , JW_THREE = #{item.jwThree,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , JW_THREE_ID = #{item.jwThreeId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARTY_NEW_ID = #{item.partyNewId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
